common.available: Aarhus, Denmark · Available for new opportunities

home.heroSubtitle: I'm Eduard — a Software Engineer at Mjølner Informatics in Aarhus. Calm under complexity, meticulous about quality, and motivated by long-term solutions for business-critical systems.

skills.heading: Tools and languages I've shipped with.
skills.description: Curated from the CV — backend-leaning full-stack with deep-water dives into mobile and tooling. Click any logo for the official docs.

work.heading: Selected work and open-source explorations.
work.description: Hand-picked case studies of business-critical systems I've helped build, alongside a live feed of every public repo where I've been learning out loud.
work.caseStudies: {count, plural, one {# case study} other {# case studies}}
work.openSourceLead: {count} public repositories from {years}+ years of side-projects, course work, and weekend experiments — auto-pulled from GitHub.

writing.heading: Notes from practice — and from the master's bench.
writing.description: Short essays on engineering and consulting, plus academic articles from my MSc in Technology-Based Business Development.
writing.articlesLead: Academic writing from my master's programme at Aarhus University.

recommends.heading: Things I've used and would buy again.
recommends.description: A small, honest collection of products, tools, and books I keep coming back to — with the reasoning, not just the link.

personal.heading: What I do when I'm not at the keyboard.
personal.description: BVB on Saturdays, the open road on weekends, and the slow accumulation of countries on a wall map. The professional half is the easy half — this one's a bit more honest.

sections.footballLede: Borussia Dortmund — the most beautiful chaos in football. Tuesday training, Saturday kickoff, Sunday post-mortems.
sections.carsLede: Driving as decompression. Long detours through Jutland, the occasional autobahn run, an embarrassing amount of music.
sections.travelHeading: A wall of countries, slowly filling
sections.travelLede: Slowly accumulating stamps and memories. Cities for the food, mountains for the silence, coastlines for the wind.

travel.heading: Notes from the road.
travel.description: Trips, places, pictures — slowly accumulating. The non-engineering side of the brain.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.description: Recruiters, fellow engineers, fellow consultants — drop a line. I read everything and reply within a few days.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
